title: 共に極めよ、カッコ良さの道

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Vodka and I have been searching for the true
meaning of "cool" by ordering at cafes and
thinking of cool instruments.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: So I've been thinking about what "cool" really is.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Of course, I know what's cool when I see it, but I
guess that's not really all there is to it...

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Augh! I still can't figure out how to describe it! It's
killing me!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Just then, we hear an angry voice from a nearby
shop.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Hm? Looks like there's some kind of commotion.

text_block_list.name: Man A
text_block_list.text:
How many times do I have to tell you?! Get me
the manager!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Oh, it's just someone complainin'. Lame...

text_block_list.name: Man A
text_block_list.text: What did you just say?!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Oh, you heard that?

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
But it's true, isn't it? What you're doin' is super
lame.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: What? It's not like I'm sayin' anything wrong.

text_block_list.name: Man A
text_block_list.text: Tch!

text_block_list.name: Man A
text_block_list.text:
Hey, you! If you're in charge of this brat, you
oughta teach her some manners!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Huh?! What're you apologizin' for?!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
This guy's actin' totally lame! There's no doubt
about it!

text_block_list.name: Man A
text_block_list.text:
Y-you've got a pretty big mouth for being such a
little punk!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: This could really turn ugly. What should I do?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: This could really turn ugly. What should I do?

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Huh?

text_block_list.name: Man A
text_block_list.text: What? Now you're gonna do something too?
choice_data_list: I'm the one responsible for her.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I can't let Vodka get hurt. I want to take care of
this calmly, but just as I take a step forward...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Slip...

text_block_list.name: Vodka and Man A
text_block_list.text: Huh?!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: T-Trainer?! Hey! Are you seriou—

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Vodka's panicked voice slowly fades out, and
then...

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Oh, you're finally awake.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Geez... Why'd you do something so out of
character?

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Can't you tell? The academy infirmary.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: It's no big deal. Just, well, y'know...

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
I carried you back to the academy after you
passed out.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Geez. Tryin' to be cool and step up, but then
trippin' like that. You're such a goof.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
It wasn't "call an ambulance" bad or anything, so I
just carried ya here on my own.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: I kinda wanted to do it myself, y'know?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: After saying that, Vodka falls silent for a moment.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Hey, you remember how I've been wondering
what "cool" is?

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
I still can't quite put the definition of cool into
words...

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
But I know that coolness isn't all about how
somethin' looks.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Not hesitating to step up when something goes
down... Now that's true coolness.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: So what I'm trying to say is...

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
I thought it was wicked cool when you stood up
for me!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Augh! Don't ever make me say that again!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Having said that, Vodka turns her face away...

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Huh? What're you—

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I grab Vodka's arm, and we run away at full
speed.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After running for a bit, we catch our breath in an
empty park.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
W-we didn't do anything wrong, though. Why'd
we run away?
choice_data_list: Sorry for making you do something lame.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Vodka, you really don't understand other
people's feelings, do you?

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Scarlet? What're you doing here?

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
I saw what happened. Everything was over before
I could say anything, though.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: What?!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: It doesn't matter. What I want to say is...

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
The reason your trainer ran away was to protect
you, obviously.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
What if you got hurt being so reckless? Then
what? Do you not care if you can't run anymore?

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: To... protect me? Is that true?

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: I... had no idea.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
I guess you can't always just act tough. You also
have to think of others and know when it's time to
run away.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: There's that kind of coolness too...

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Well, knowing me, I might still be reckless...

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
But when that happens, will you stop me again
like you did today?

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Sigh... Don't make your trainer baby you, Vodka. You should grow up at least a little too.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Th-that's not how it is! Don't say weird stuff like
that!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: I'm super mature! Right?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: I can only chuckle nervously in response.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Huh? What's that supposed to mean?
choice_data_list: I trust you know what the right thing to do is.
I trust you know what the right thing to do is.

text_block_list.name: Man A
text_block_list.text: Well, we gonna do this or not?!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Augh!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: And Vodka chooses...

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Siiigh... Geez. A good wallop woulda been tempting, but...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Vodka defuses the situation by threatening to
call the police.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Still, I can't believe you actually left it up to me.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
What would you have done if I went on a
rampage and beat him up?

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: ...Really? You did?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I believed Vodka could control herself, and I tell
her as much.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: ...Hah. It's probably... 'cause of you.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
The old me probably would've jumped in without
thinkin' about the consequences.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
But I remembered that the first thing you did was
apologize.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
That made me not wanna fight for some reason...
Geez, I've totally changed.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Huh? That was... cool? What do you mean?

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: What's gotten into you all of a sudden?
choice_data_list: Exercising self-restraint when it matters is cool.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: ...I see. It's not just about jumping straight in.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Holding back can be cool too, huh...

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Thanks, Trainer...

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Thanks to you, I finally understand what it means
to be cool.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
...Or at least one more part of it. So... I thought I
should thank you.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As soon as the words are out, Vodka scratches
her head as if to hide her embarrassment.
